overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow approach toward a coastal building complex at night. Heavy fog and atmospheric haze obscure the distant city lights while fires burn in the foreground, creating a moody, dystopian atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waterfront with corporate building complex

agents.ego_description: slowly flying forward toward the waterfront building, maintaining a steady aerial perspective

entered.detail: large modern rectangular building with illuminated windows situated on the coastline
dark ocean water extending to the horizon with reflections of distant lights
scattered fires and burning wreckage providing orange illumination in the foreground
fog-obscured city lights and structures visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: A slow aerial approach through heavy fog toward a coastal building complex at night. The scene features a large modern waterfront structure with the ocean to the right and burning debris in the foreground. Distant city lights twinkle through the haze on the left, creating an atmospheric cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow aerial approach through a dense nocturnal haze toward a glowing coastal industrial complex. It begins deep within heavy fog, where the camera glides forward as distant city lights twinkle faintly through the atmospheric blur on the left. As the movement continues, the visibility improves to reveal a large modern waterfront structure flanked by the dark expanse of the ocean to the right. The scene then shifts focus toward the foreground, where the oppressive gloom is punctuated by the orange glow of burning debris before the camera settles on the imposing silhouette of the coastal buildings.
